Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Maybe it'd be better if I just quit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The club would probably be fine without me. Besides, I...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I don't think I'm cut out to be an artist.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 13 11 5 108}Ahaha, so you did hear everything, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 13 11 5 108}Y-Yeah, well... I guess you did hear everything, huh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}My dad told me to quit the art club.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}He said I need to study more and concentrate on my future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}When I told him I was a finalist in the contest, I thought he'd be proud.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}But all he said was that I was wasting my time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}He said it's my responsibility to take over the hospital because I'm his only son.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}My dad doesn't care about me! He only cares about his stupid hospital![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Just because my dad's a doctor, everyone expects me to be one, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I have my own dreams too, you know! Ugh, I can't stand it anymore![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}You're right. I have to tell my dad how I feel.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 13 11 5 108}No, I don't want that! It's my life, and I want to live it my way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I've figured it out! I'm going to make a bet with my dad![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}If I don't win the contest, then I'll quit the club, just like he wants me to.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}But if I win, then I can do whatever I want! And as soon as I get home, I'm going to convince him![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 1}-kun, do you mind keeping this under wraps?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 21 108 11}I don't want anyone worrying that I might quit the art club, so let's just keep this between us, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiraga really opened up to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're becoming better friends.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Hey, would you mind letting the art club know that I'll be taking the day off?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I want to have the talk with my dad today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was pretty active in the club today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wrapped up club activities[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
